videos.title: Canon's new R6 V - A mini C50... but better?
videos.description:
Canon's new R6V, a video heavy powerhouse that sits in a category of cameras. Paired with a brand new automatic 20-50 lens, this 7K RAW open gate camera might just be what every creator has been looking for.

videos.title: The One Habit That Separates Pro Photographers From Amateurs
videos.description:
Special guest Jason Roman, a New York City Photographer shooting massive campaigns and Hollywood movie posters gives his tips on how to be faster with a camera so you never miss a moment. The ultimate cheat code that will without a doubt make you a better photographer. 

JASON ROMAN: https://www.instagram.com/stockezy/
